## Problem-Driven Change Only

This project follows a strict **problem-driven iteration** philosophy. Every PR must originate from a real problem encountered while actually using the Skill. Theoretical improvements, speculative optimizations, and "just in case" refactors will be rejected.

### Checklist (all required)

- [ ] I have **actually used** this Skill in a real project and hit a concrete problem
- [ ] This PR fixes that specific problem — nothing more, nothing less
- [ ] This is **NOT** an AI-suggested "optimization" without a real failure behind it

### What happened?

<!-- Describe the actual scenario: what were you doing, which AI agent were you using, what task did you give it? -->

### What went wrong?

<!-- Describe the concrete failure: wrong output, missing step, infinite loop, broken format, etc. Be specific — "could be better" is not a problem. -->

### How does this PR fix it?

<!-- Explain the minimal change you made and why it directly addresses the problem above. -->

### Evidence

<!-- Paste logs, screenshots, or before/after comparisons that prove the problem existed and this fix resolves it. -->

---

> **Maintainer note:** PRs that cannot demonstrate a real, reproducible problem will be closed without review. We value battle-tested fixes over theoretical improvements. If an AI told you "this could be optimized" but you never actually experienced a failure — please don't open a PR.
